folders.justification: InvokeAsync lowering is split by receiver, capture, payload, and result-reader concerns; existing folder remains dense until the analyzer layout is reorganized.
PluginServer facade generation is split by controls, validation, world, properties, and emit support; existing folder remains dense until the analyzer layout is reorganized.
Runtime RPC support contains codecs, marshalling, DTO shape handling, and service registration helpers that share one public runtime area.
KernelMethod lowering has many focused regression fixtures covering distinct generated-code shapes.
Remote RunLocal runtime coverage is intentionally split into focused fixtures for local callback and projection behavior.
Kernel RPC regression coverage is split by codec, marshalling, proxy, DTO, and service-registration behavior.
Server-extension RPC regression coverage is split by lowering, DTO, fallback, payload, and runtime behavior.
